style.description: Martial art or combatives system (e.g., 'Taekwondo WT', 'IBJJF BJJ', 'MCMAP').

belt_level.description: Rank or level (e.g., '1st Dan Black Belt', 'Black Belt 1st Degree').

jurisdiction.description: Legal context; currently scoped to the United States.

legitimacy_hint.description: Optional hint; model still performs its own assessment.

conduct_observations.description: Observed behaviors, incidents, or notes about conduct.

ethical_responses.description: Practitioner’s answers to ethical / right‑to‑choose questions.

legal_context.description: Optional description of self‑defense, use‑of‑force, or local policy context.

auditor_notes.description: Optional free‑text notes from human auditor.
